animation.css_keyframes: @keyframes fly_FLAP { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 60vh) rotate(-5deg); } 20% { transform: translate(10vw, 75vh) rotate(3deg); } 40% { transform: translate(45vw, 30vh) rotate(-8deg); } 60% { transform: translate(75vw, 55vh) rotate(4deg); } 80% { transform: translate(100vw, 35vh) rotate(-3deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 45vh) rotate(6deg); } }
